error.signature: Gradle build fails: Could not determine java version — JAVA_HOME path has spaces

verdict.summary: Gradle build fails when JAVA_HOME or project path contains spaces, especially on Windows with backslash paths.

dead_ends.why_fails: gradle.properties does not interpret shell quotes; the literal quote characters become part of the path

dead_ends.action: Set JAVA_HOME with Windows short name (PROGRA~1)
dead_ends.why_fails: Short names are not always enabled on all volumes and may not resolve correctly

workarounds.action: Install JDK to a path without spaces (e.g., /opt/jdk17 or C:\jdk17)
workarounds.how: export JAVA_HOME=/opt/jdk-17  # avoid 'Program Files' or any path with spaces

workarounds.action: Use org.gradle.java.home in gradle.properties with forward slashes and no spaces
workarounds.how: org.gradle.java.home=C:/jdk-17  # use forward slashes, no spaces in path
